title: In-browser AR Face Filter (Natural Beauty + Traditional Ornaments + Variants)

requirements.summary: Implement an in-browser webcam AR experience with real-time face-aligned overlays and robust camera states.
acceptanceCriteria: User can start/stop the camera and grant permissions from the UI
When the camera is active, the app renders a live preview with face-aligned overlays at interactive frame rates
If camera permission is denied/unavailable, the UI shows a clear error state and recovery instructions

file_operations.description: Add/adjust frontend dependencies needed for in-browser face tracking and rendering (e.g., MediaPipe face landmarks) to support real-time overlays.
Wire a single AR experience view into the app and ensure navigation renders it (avoid introducing extra routes unless already present).

Create the main AR page that hosts the camera preview, start/stop controls, error states, and an overlay canvas. Use the selected camera component hook `useCamera` to manage permissions, start/stop, and preview; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Add a hook that initializes and runs face landmark tracking on the live video stream and exposes stable landmark/pose data for overlay alignment.
Implement a renderer that composites the camera frame plus AR overlays onto a canvas at interactive frame rates, handling resize/aspect ratio and performance throttling.

Add a small UI component that renders clear English error messages for unsupported devices, permission denied, or missing camera, including recovery instructions. Use shadcn/ui primitives for consistent styling; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Add the Natural Beauty makeup overlays (subtle smoothing, blush, gloss, eye sparkle) that remain realistic and tracked.
acceptanceCriteria: Makeup overlays remain aligned to the face during head movement
Skin smoothing is subtle (no plastic/over-blur look) and retains visible texture
Blush, lips gloss, and eye sparkle are visibly present but remain minimal and natural-looking

file_operations.description: Implement the base makeup effect module that converts face landmarks into overlay geometry and draws: (1) subtle smoothing, (2) blush, (3) lip gloss, (4) eye sparkle with minimal, realistic parameters.
Add a subtle, texture-preserving smoothing pass (lightweight, configurable intensity) applied only to the face region to avoid an over-blurred look.
Add blend utilities for blush and lip gloss that support soft edges and low-opacity layering for a natural result.
Integrate the Natural Beauty makeup effect into the render pipeline so it stays aligned with landmark updates and respects intensity controls.

requirements.summary: Render traditional ornaments (maang tikka, nose ring, jhumkas, necklace) anchored to tracked regions with gentle sway.
acceptanceCriteria: Each ornament is rendered and anchored to the correct facial region (forehead parting, nostril, ears, neck/collar region)
Ornaments remain stable without excessive jitter during normal motion
Ornaments exhibit a gentle secondary motion (subtle sway/lag) while remaining attached to the tracked pose

file_operations.description: Add the generated ornament asset at the required path so the frontend can load it as a static overlay sprite.
Add the generated ornament asset at the required path so the frontend can load it as a static overlay sprite.
Add the generated ornament asset at the required path so the frontend can load it as a static overlay sprite.
Add the generated ornament asset at the required path so the frontend can load it as a static overlay sprite.

Implement ornament sprites anchored to forehead parting (maang tikka), nostril (nose ring), ears (jhumkas), and neck/collar region (necklace) using face landmarks; apply smoothing/jitter reduction and a gentle secondary motion (lag/sway).
Add a reusable secondary-motion filter (spring/lerp-based) that introduces subtle sway while preserving attachment to tracked pose.
Integrate the traditional ornament effect into the composite draw order so ornaments sit naturally relative to makeup (and remain stable with smoothing + sway).

requirements.summary: Add a face-following soft glow and subtle pastel sparkles that do not overpower the look.
acceptanceCriteria: A soft face-centered glow is visible and follows the user’s face position
Pastel sparkles appear around the face area and animate subtly (twinkle/drift)
Sparkles/glow do not obscure facial features or overpower the makeup/ornaments

file_operations.description: Add the generated pastel sparkle spritesheet asset at the required path for subtle particle rendering.
Implement a soft, face-centered glow that follows the face bounds/center from landmarks and blends gently without obscuring features.
Implement subtle particle sparkles (twinkle/drift) around the face region using the spritesheet and conservative density/opacity defaults.
Add glow + sparkles into the renderer with a controlled draw order and intensity scaling so they remain classy and non-distracting.

requirements.summary: Add a background blur option behind the subject while keeping the face/subject sharp, with a performance toggle.
acceptanceCriteria: Background is visibly blurred while the subject/face remains comparatively sharp
Blur transitions look smooth around hair/edges (no harsh cutout)
Provide a UI toggle to enable/disable background blur for performance compatibility

file_operations.description: Add/adjust frontend dependencies needed for in-browser person segmentation to support background blur behind the subject.
Create a hook that runs lightweight in-browser person/foreground segmentation and outputs a soft mask suitable for smooth blur transitions.
Implement background blur compositing using the segmentation mask (soft edges/feathering) while keeping the subject comparatively sharp.

Add a toggle control for background blur and wire it to enable/disable the segmentation + blur pipeline in real time. Use shadcn/ui controls for the toggle; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Integrate optional background blur as an early render stage so later makeup/ornaments/glow remain crisp atop the composited result.

requirements.summary: Provide live-switchable style variants (Bridal, Anime Sparkle, Festival) that add elements on top of the base Natural Beauty look.
acceptanceCriteria: User can switch between at least: Natural Beauty (base), South Indian Bridal, Cute Anime Sparkle, and Festival
Each variant visibly adds the described elements without removing the base natural makeup unless explicitly toggled off
Variant switching updates the effect live without requiring a page reload

file_operations.description: Add the generated jasmine flowers asset at the required path for the Bridal variant.
Add the generated temple jewellery pack asset at the required path for the Bridal variant.
Add the generated hearts/stars spritesheet asset at the required path for the Anime variant.
Add the generated glitter tears overlays asset at the required path for the Anime variant.
Add the generated bindi asset at the required path for the Festival variant.
Add the generated diya glow sprite asset at the required path for the Festival variant.
Add the generated golden shimmer spritesheet asset at the required path for the Festival variant.
Define variant identifiers and a small configuration model to describe which add-on effects are enabled per variant (base + add-ons).
Implement South Indian Bridal add-ons: jasmine hair flowers + temple jewellery style overlays anchored to head/forehead regions, layered over the base look.
Implement Cute Anime Sparkle add-ons: tiny hearts/stars particles plus glitter tear overlays under the eyes, kept soft and not neon.
Implement Festival add-ons: small bindi + diya-inspired warm glow lighting + golden shimmer particles with conservative intensity.

Add a variant selector UI and wire it to swap variant configuration live without reload. Use shadcn/ui selection components (e.g., Tabs/Select); verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Update the renderer to apply: base Natural Beauty + Traditional Ornaments + per-variant add-ons, with live switching and stable draw order.

requirements.summary: Add labeled intensity controls for key effects plus a Reset to default action, all updating the preview immediately.
acceptanceCriteria: Each listed effect has an adjustable control that updates the preview immediately
Reset restores the default “classy, cute, realistic, minimal makeup” settings
Controls are labeled in English and are understandable without documentation

file_operations.description: Define default intensity settings that match the minimal, realistic Natural Beauty baseline and serve as the reset target.
Create a settings hook to manage intensities (skin smoothing, blush, lip gloss, eye sparkle, glow/sparkles, background blur) and expose update + reset actions.

Implement a control panel with labeled sliders/toggles and a Reset button. Use shadcn/ui components (e.g., Slider, Button, Switch, Card) to maintain consistent styling; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Wire the EffectControlsPanel into the AR page and connect settings to the renderer so adjustments update the preview immediately.
Read intensity settings during each render pass and scale makeup/ornaments/glow/sparkles/blur accordingly.

requirements.summary: Add a Capture action that downloads a still image of the current AR composite locally with a sensible filename.
acceptanceCriteria: User can capture and download an image (PNG or JPEG) of the current frame including overlays
Downloaded file has a reasonable default name and includes the visible variant/effects
Capture works without any backend upload requirement

file_operations.description: Implement a capture utility that exports the current composed preview (camera + effects) from the render canvas to a downloadable PNG/JPEG with a variant-aware default filename.

Add a prominent Capture button near the preview and wire it to download the current composite. Also continue to use the selected `useCamera` hook for camera preview and readiness states; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Apply a cohesive soft natural glam + warm gold UI theme across the app, avoiding blue/purple as primary colors.
acceptanceCriteria: The UI has a consistent palette and typography across all screens/components
Primary styling emphasizes warm neutrals (e.g., ivory/peach) and gold accents
No major UI areas use blue/purple as the primary brand color

file_operations.description: Create global styles and CSS variables for a warm neutral + gold-accent theme (ivory/peach backgrounds, warm text, gold highlights) and apply consistent typography/spacing defaults. Ensure user-facing text remains English.
Adjust Tailwind theme tokens (via CSS variables already referenced) and any needed extensions to support the warm gold aesthetic while avoiding blue/purple as primary brand colors.
Apply the themed layout styling to the AR page (cards/panels, spacing, responsive preview sizing) using composed shadcn/ui components (do not edit immutable ui component files).

requirements.summary: Add a lightweight Lens Notes section that summarizes the selected look and active add-ons in English and updates live.
acceptanceCriteria: Notes update when switching variants or toggling major effects
All user-facing text is in English
Notes are descriptive but brief (no implementation instructions)

file_operations.description: Create a compact notes panel that summarizes the current variant and active add-ons (ornaments, sparkles/glow, background blur) in brief English sentences. Use shadcn/ui Card/Text styling by composition; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Wire LensNotes into the AR page and connect it to the current variant and settings state so it updates immediately when the user changes options.
